404.title: We can't find that page.
404.description:
The page you're looking for doesn't exist — but it might have moved. Try one of these starting points:

**[API reference](/docs/api-reference)** — every TTS, WebSocket, and utility endpoint

**[WebSocket overview](/docs/websockets)** — pick the right WebSocket endpoint for your use case

**[Five-minute quickstart](/docs/quickstart-five-minute)** — generate your first audio clip

**[Models](/docs/models)** — Coda, Arcana, Mist family

**[Voices](/docs/voices)** — the full voice catalog

**[API authentication](/docs/api-authentication)** — how API keys work

**[Changelog](/docs/changelog)** — recent changes and release notes

If you're an AI agent, a machine-friendly index of every page is available at [/llms.txt](/llms.txt).

Think something is genuinely broken? [Report a broken link](mailto:support@rime.ai).
